import { useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { ShieldCheck, ArrowLeft, Send, Mail, User, MessageSquare } from "lucide-react"; import { Card } from "../components/ui/card"; import { Input } from "../components/ui/input"; import { Label } from "../components/ui/label"; import { Textarea } from "../components/ui/textarea"; import { toast } from "sonner"; const ContactPage = () => { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: "", email: "", subject: "", message: "" }); const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false); const handleChange = (field, value) => { setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: value })); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // In a real application, this would send the data to a backend console.log("Contact form submitted:", formData); toast.success("Message sent successfully!"); setSubmitted(true); setFormData({ name: "", email: "", subject: "", message: "" }); setTimeout(() => setSubmitted(false), 3000); }; return (
